# agent-do

> Provider-agnostic autonomous agent loop for JavaScript. Built on the Vercel AI SDK.

## Core

- `createAgent(config: AgentConfig): Agent` — create an agent with run(), stream(), abort()
- `runAgentLoop(config, task, context?, history?): Promise<RunResult>` — run loop directly
- `streamAgentLoop(config, task, context?, history?): AsyncGenerator<ProgressEvent>` — stream events

## Agent Interface

- `agent.run(task, context?, history?): Promise<string>` — synchronous execution
- `agent.stream(task, context?, history?): AsyncIterable<ProgressEvent>` — streaming execution
- `agent.abort()` — cancel the current run
- `agent.id: string` — agent identifier
- `agent.name: string` — agent display name

## ProgressEvent Types

- `thinking` — model is generating
- `tool-call` — calling a tool (toolName, toolArgs)
- `tool-result` — tool returned (toolName, toolResult)
- `text` — text output
- `step-complete` — loop iteration finished
- `done` — agent completed
- `error` — error or limit exceeded

## File Tools

- `createFileTools(store: MemoryStore, agentId: string): ToolSet` — creates read_file, write_file, list_directory, delete_file, grep_file, find_files

## Memory Stores

- `InMemoryMemoryStore` — in-memory (testing/prototyping, data lost on exit)
- `FilesystemMemoryStore(baseDir: string, options?: FilesystemMemoryStoreOptions)` — Node.js filesystem (persistent)
  - `options.readOnly: boolean` — block all write operations
  - `options.onBeforeWrite: (agentId, canonicalPath, operation) => boolean | Promise<boolean>` — approve/deny each write
- `MemoryStore` interface: read, write, append, delete, list, mkdir, exists, search

## Skills

- `InMemorySkillStore` — in-memory skill storage
- `parseSkillMd(content: string): Skill` — parse SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter
- `buildSkillsPrompt(skills: Skill[]): string` — build system prompt section
- `createSkillTools(store: SkillStore): ToolSet` — search/install/list/remove skills

## Orchestration

- `createOrchestrator(config: OrchestratorConfig): Orchestrator` — master + workers
- Master gets: delegate_task, list_agents, get_agent_status tools
- `orchestrator.run(task)` / `orchestrator.stream(task)`

## Lifecycle Hooks

- `onPreToolUse(event)` — before tool call, return HookDecision to allow/deny/modify
- `onPostToolUse(event)` — after tool call, with duration
- `onStepStart(event)` — before each iteration, return stop to halt
- `onStepComplete(event)` — after each iteration
- `onComplete(event)` — when run finishes, with full usage
- `onUsage(record)` — after each LLM call with token counts

## Permissions

- `mode: 'accept-all' | 'deny-all' | 'ask'`
- Per-tool overrides: `tools: { read_file: 'always', delete_file: 'never' }`
- `onPermissionRequest(toolName, args): Promise<boolean>`

## Usage Tracking

- `UsageTracker` — tracks tokens and cost per run
- `estimateCost(model, inputTokens, outputTokens): number`
- `DEFAULT_PRICING` — built-in pricing for 50+ models
- Per-run and per-day spending limits

## Testing

- `createMockModel(options: MockModelOptions)` ��� mock LanguageModel with predetermined responses
- Import from `agent-do/testing`

## ConversationMessage

- `{ role: 'user' | 'assistant', content: string }` — for passing conversation history

## Prompt Builder (agent-do/prompts)

- `buildSystemPrompt(options: BuildSystemPromptOptions): string` — compose a system prompt
  - `options.template: string | PromptTemplate` — named template or custom template object
  - `options.sectionOrder: string[]` — override section order
  - `options.sections: Record<string, SectionFn>` — custom/override section functions
  - `options.variables: Record<string, string>` — interpolated into sections
  - `options.append: Array<string | SectionFn>` — content appended after sections
  - `options.prepend: Array<string | SectionFn>` — content prepended before sections
- `interpolate(template, variables): string` — {{variable}} replacement
- `builtinTemplates` — assistant, coder, researcher, reviewer, writer, planner
- `builtinSections` — identity, memoryManagement, fileTools, efficiency, concise, selfEditing, learnedPreferences, htmlGeneration, todoTracking, runtimeContext
- `roleSections` — codingApproach, researchApproach, reviewApproach, writingApproach, planningApproach
